overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town during golden hour. The character enters and exits timber taverns and stone warehouses along a waterfront dock, with detailed historic architecture and atmospheric lighting transitions between outdoor and indoor environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor boardwalk with timber warehouses

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along wooden harbor walkways toward a tavern entrance, passing cargo barrels and wooden structures

entered.detail: large wooden structure with thatched roof sections and multiple levels
weathered wooden dock planks with rope coils
stone building with arched windows and wooden shutters
wooden cargo crane structure for loading ships
stacked wooden cargo barrels and sacks

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wooden harbor boardwalk during golden hour, approaching a timber tavern. The scene features medieval harbor architecture with thatched roofs, stone walls, and wooden cargo structures. Warm sunlight casts long shadows across the weathered wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden tavern interior with support beams and lantern light

events.description: Geralt enters the wooden tavern through a heavy arched doorway
exits the tavern through the far doorway into bright waterfront sunlight

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the tavern, walks through the wooden interior between support beams, and exits toward the waterfront

entered.detail: thick vertical wooden posts and crossbeams supporting the ceiling
warm glowing lanterns hanging from ceiling beams
wooden storage shelves with various goods and containers
arched wooden exit doorway leading to bright exterior

segments.scene_description: Inside the timber tavern, warm lantern light illuminates wooden support beams and storage shelves. Geralt walks through the interior space, passing between thick wooden posts, and approaches the arched exit doorway where bright golden hour sunlight streams in from the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval waterfront promenade with docked ships

events.description: exits tavern into open waterfront area with sailing ships visible in harbor
approaches stone warehouse entrance with large wooden door

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the cobblestone waterfront promenade past docked ships and cargo crates, heading toward a stone warehouse

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople in red garments standing near the dock edge

entered.detail: large wooden sailing vessel with furled sails docked at harbor
wooden pier structures extending into calm harbor water
stacked wooden cargo boxes and canvas-covered goods
large stone warehouse building with arched entrance and timber framing

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the waterfront, the scene opens to a wide harbor view with sailing ships docked at wooden piers. Geralt walks along cobblestone streets past cargo crates and groups of townspeople, with the sun setting behind the buildings casting a warm golden light across the stone warehouse ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone warehouse entrance and dim interior transition

events.description: enters stone warehouse through large arched doorway with heavy wooden doors
interior becomes significantly darker moving deeper into warehouse away from entrance

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the stone warehouse through the arched doorway and walks into the dimly lit interior with wooden shelves and storage

entered.detail: large stone arched entrance doorway with wooden doors
wooden shelves with bottles, jars, and stored goods
dried meat and herbs hanging from ceiling hooks
wooden work table with pottery and containers
rough-hewn stone block walls with narrow windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the stone warehouse through a massive arched doorway, transitioning from the bright waterfront to a dim interior. The space features rough stone walls, wooden storage shelves with goods, and dried meat hanging from the ceiling. Light filters through narrow windows as the character moves deeper into the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark warehouse storage room with sleeping quarters

events.description: turns to explore side alcove with wooden bed and personal items

agents.ego_description: Geralt explores the dark warehouse interior, examining shelves and turning to investigate a side room with a bed

entered.detail: simple wooden bed with fur covering and straw mattress
small slit window letting in sliver of daylight
heavy wooden exit door with metal hinges

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the stone warehouse, Geralt explores a dimly lit storage area with wooden shelves holding various goods. The character turns to examine a side alcove containing a simple wooden bed, then continues toward a heavy wooden exit door where daylight is visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock with large cargo wheel mechanism

events.description: exits warehouse back to waterfront dock area with large wooden wheel visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt exits the warehouse onto a wooden dock featuring a large cargo wheel mechanism and harbor views

entered.detail: large wooden cargo wheel mechanism for hoisting goods
calm water of the harbor reflecting golden sunlight
weathered wooden dock walkway with rope coils

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the warehouse onto a wooden dock bathed in golden hour light. A large wooden cargo wheel mechanism dominates the left side of the frame, with sailing ships visible in the harbor waters beyond. The scene concludes with the character walking along the weathered dock planks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval harbor town, transitioning from sun-drenched boardwalks through a series of dim interiors and back into the golden hour light. It begins with Geralt walking along a wooden boardwalk past thatched roofs and stone walls before moving into the warm lantern light of a timber tavern. As he exits the tavern, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront filled with sailing ships and cobblestone streets, leading him through a massive arched doorway into the dim, cool interior of a stone warehouse. The camera then follows him deeper into the warehouse past hanging meats and a small sleeping alcove before turning toward a heavy wooden door. Finally, the character emerges back onto a weathered dock, where the bright sunset illuminates a large cargo wheel and the distant harbor waters.
